actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.sid,
       wxht.customer,
       wxht.jhrq,
       wxht.dmt,
       wxht.mt,
       wxht.wfgs,
       wxht.kh_id
FROM wxht 
WHERE (wxht.order_id=[采购跟单.外销合同]) 
  AND permission('外销合同') 
ORDER BY wxht.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT hgbmbsheet.sid,
       hgbmbsheet.hgbm,
       hgbmbsheet.tsl,
       hgbmbsheet.zzsl,
       hgbmbsheet.hwmc,
       hgbmbsheet.cznr,
       hgbmbsheet.dw,

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymx.fphm,
       cymx.zdry,
       cymx.sjcy1,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymx.hwzt
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymxsheet.cght=[采购跟单.产品资料.合同号码]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.cpbh=[采购跟单.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.wxwyzd=[采购跟单.产品资料.外销唯一字段]) 
  AND (CYMXSHEET.FPSB1="是") 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cghtsheet.bjhh,
       cghtsheet.zwpm,
       cght.hthm,
       cghtsheet.cpgg,
       cghtsheet.yse,
       cghtsheet.zhwbzh,
       cghtsheet.nhrl,
       cghtsheet.wxrl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.cgxs,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.zje,
       cght.jhrq,
       cghtsheet.tj,
       cghtsheet.jz,
       cghtsheet.mz,
       cghtsheet.zjz,
       cghtsheet.bzcd,
       cghtsheet.bzkd,
       cghtsheet.bzgd,
       cghtsheet.nhwx,
       cghtsheet.ks,
       cghtsheet.wyzd,
       cghtsheet.zmz,
       cghtsheet.ztj,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.zje,
       cghtsheet.dyg1,
       cghtsheet.dyg2,
       cghtsheet.khhh,
       cghtsheet.krtm,
       cghtsheet.bgjldw,
       cghtsheet.ljrk,
       cghtsheet.wxwyzd,
       cghtsheet.bjhh1,
       cghtsheet.zsbh
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.hthm=[采购跟单.唯一字段]) 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid ASC

       pgzlb.cpbh,
       pgzlb.zwmc,
       pgzlb.zhwbgpm,
       pgzlb.hgbm,
       pgzlb.bgjldw,
       pgzlb.zzsl,
       pgzlb.tsl,
       pgzlb.ljrk,
       pgzlb.sfhs,
       pgzlb.hthm,
       pgzlb.bzyq,
       pgzlb.nxrl,
       pgzlb.nhwx,
       pgzlb.pgwy,
       pgzlb.zxl,
       pgzlb.htzxs,
       pgzlb.htzsl,
       pgzlb.qrjq,
       pgzlb.yjch,
       pgzlb.jcsj,
       pgzlb.wyzd,
       pgzlb.wxwyzd,
       pgzlb.hyd,
       pgzlb.bjhh1,
       pgzlb.pgcq,
       pgzlb.zycpbh,
       pgzlb.pid,
       pgzlb.ymdg,
       pgzlb.xmdg,
       pgzlb.ckmc,
       pgzlb.khmc,
       pgzlb.whtzxs,
       pgzlb.cypd,
       pgzlb.rkpd,
       pgzlb.dzry,
       pgzlb.cyry,
       pgzlb.ywcsl,
       pgzlb.pgrq,
       pgzlb.rkdd,
       pgzlb.bzcd,
       pgzlb.bzkd,
       pgzlb.bzgd,
       pgzlb.wxcc,
       pgzlb.htztj,
       pgzlb.jz,
       pgzlb.mz,
       pgzlb.htzjz,
       pgzlb.htzmz,
       pgzlb.gkbh,
       pgzlb.zcxs,
       pgzlb.pkrmb,

FROM pgzlb

ORDER BY pgzlb.sid ASC
